questions.q: The relation between $R$ and $r$ (internal resistance of the battery) for which the power consumed in the external part of the circuit is maximum.
questions.solution: Circuit is forming a wheatstone bridge $R_{e q}=2 R$ For maximum power transfer $2 \mathrm{R}=\mathrm{r}$.
